examples: It would be imprudent to invest all your money in one company.
It was rather imprudent of the little girl to interrupt our conversation like that.
I am afraid he has been very imprudent, and has deserved to lose Mr. Darcy's regard.
It is imprudent in the extreme to eliminate such a valuable asset without replacement.
Starve the productive and the relatively prudent to lend to the unproductive and imprudent.
